allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) paths = data.get\('paths', {}\) for path in paths: if 'auth' in path.lower\(\) or 'token' in path.lower\(\) or 'login' in path.lower\(\): print\(path\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for method,fields in d.get\('actions',{}\).items\(\): print\(f'{method}:'\) for f,info in fields.items\(\): print\(f' {f}: type={info.get\(\\"type\\"\)} required={info.get\(\\"required\\"\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for l in d['results']: print\('id:', l['id'], '| price:', l.get\('price'\), '| type:', l['price_type'], '| merchant:', l['merchant']['id']\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for l in d['results']: p=l.get\('price'\) if p: print\('id:', l['id'], '| price:', p, '| merchant:', l['merchant']['id']\) break ")
